name: pr-review
description: PR review workflow with specialized review agents and automated fix loop

interface.shortDescription: Structured PR review and review-finding workflows.
interface.longDescription: Codex wrapper for the PR review plugin. Exposes the existing review, fix-loop, and comment-response skills while keeping the agent prompt files available for Codex spawn_agent shims.
defaultPrompt: Review PR #123 for code, tests, and security issues.
Work through the open findings for PR #123.
Draft responses to GitHub review comments on PR #123.
